title: Icy Breath freeze summoned creature

card.rawText: Play this card when your opponent summons a creature. That creature is frozen and cannot inflict Atk damage or be sacrificed. During their turn they may roll 1 die. If 5-6, this effect ends and this card is sent to the cemetery.

effect.value: Frozen; cannot inflict Atk damage or be sacrificed

plan.title: Icy Breath freeze summoned creature
plan.summary: Verify Icy Breath effect 111-E01: Freeze summoned creature.

notes: Player_1 responds when player_2 summons a creature, then the affected creature rolls 6 during its turn to end the effect.

Play this card when your opponent summons a creature. That creature is frozen and cannot inflict Atk damage or be sacrificed. During their turn they may roll 1 die. If 5-6, this effect ends and this card is sent to the cemetery.
